name: Sandtortchen (Sand Tarts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and butter together until smooth.
2. Beat in the 2 eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually blend in the flour mixture until a soft dough forms.
4. Chill the dough overnight in the refrigerator.
5. On a well-floured surface, roll out the dough as thinly as possible.
6. Cut the dough into diamonds using a knife. Place the cut cookies on greased cookie sheets.
7. Brush each cookie with beaten egg white.
8. Sprinkle sugar and a pinch of cinnamon over each cookie.
9. Place a pecan half in the center of each cookie.
10. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the edges are light brown.
11. Cool on the baking sheets for 1 minute before transferring to wire racks.
12. Store in airtight tins.
